GenAiFunction.description:
- Use this action to query Data Cloud objects using ANSI SQL (not SOQL). - Use this instead of QueryRecordsWithSoql when querying Data Cloud / Data Lake objects (names ending in __dlm). - The action takes an ANSI SQL query string and returns JSON containing either: * On success: JSON array of result records (each record is a map of field names to values) * On error: JSON object with message, type, and stack trace - Data Cloud supports full ANSI SQL: JOINs, CTEs, window functions, GROUP BY, HAVING, etc. - If the query fails, parse the error and retry with a corrected query. - Always use ExploreDataCloudSchema first to discover available fields. Never guess field names.
Output Formatting: - The raw JSON is not shown to users — parse and present as tables, lists, or summaries - Synthesize data into business insights, not raw dumps - For aggregates, explain what the numbers mean
